title: Fix duplicate frontmatter in src-edit-proposal-rigor skill
summary: Repair metadata integrity in src-edit-proposal-rigor by reducing to one valid frontmatter block and preserving behavior.
details:
Apply a surgical metadata fix to `skills/src-edit-proposal-rigor/SKILL.md`.

Scope:
1. Remove duplicate frontmatter block(s).
2. Keep one valid YAML frontmatter with consistent keys.
3. Preserve existing instructional body unless minimally required for frontmatter consistency.
4. Verify no duplicate top-level metadata sections remain.

Acceptance:
- Exactly one valid frontmatter block exists.
- Skill content remains functionally equivalent.

affectedFiles.description: Remove duplicate frontmatter and normalize metadata.

diffPreview:

+ Single valid frontmatter block with preserved intent.
estimatedImpact: Improves skill parsing reliability and prevents metadata-related routing issues.
